title: Meridian Technologies — Form 10-K FY2023
short_summary: Meridian FY2023 annual filing. ARR $38.1M (+34% YoY), gross margin 71%, NRR 118%, zero debt. Discloses top-3 customer concentration at ~58% of ARR as a primary risk factor.
excerpt:
MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES, INC.
FORM 10-K — FISCAL YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2023
EXCERPT: BUSINESS OVERVIEW AND SELECTED FINANCIAL DATA

BUSINESS OVERVIEW

Meridian Technologies, Inc. is a B2B fintech platform headquartered in Austin, Texas. The Company
provides embedded payment infrastructure and real-time reconciliation software to mid-market and
enterprise financial institutions across the United States. Meridian's flagship product, ClearFlow,
enables banks and financial institutions to automate p

title: Summit Financial Research — Meridian Coverage Initiation (Q3 2023)
short_summary: STALE. Initial BUY coverage. Projects 35% ARR growth and $480M EV. Underestimates customer concentration (~45% cited vs actual 58%). Superseded by Q4 2023 update.
excerpt:
RESEARCH NOTE — MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES
COVERAGE INITIATION
Summit Financial Research | September 20, 2023

MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES: INITIATING COVERAGE WITH BUY

We initiate coverage of Meridian Technologies with a BUY rating and a base-case enterprise
value target of $480 million.

INVESTMENT THESIS

Meridian is positioned to capture significant share in the $14 billion back-office reconciliation
and embedded payments market. Its ClearFlow platform has demonstrated strong product-market fit
with r

title: Summit Financial Research — Meridian Estimate Revision (Q4 2023)
short_summary: Updated estimates. ARR growth cut from 35% to 22%. Concentration revised to 58-62% in top 3. EV target lowered to $340M. Maintains BUY. Supersedes September 2023 note.
excerpt:
RESEARCH NOTE UPDATE — MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES
Summit Financial Research | January 15, 2024

MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES: REVISING ESTIMATES DOWNWARD; RATING MAINTAINED AT BUY

We are revising our September 2023 financial projections for Meridian Technologies following
the release of Q3 2023 earnings data and updated channel checks.

REVISION SUMMARY

Our FY2024 ARR growth estimate is revised downward from 35% to 22%, reflecting:

  — Slower-than-expected enterprise contract closings: one of two anticip

title: Meridian Technologies — Series C Press Release
short_summary: Meridian closes $45M Series C led by Parkview Growth Equity. ARR $27.1M, NRR 114%, 39 enterprise clients at close. Total funding $72M.
excerpt:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES CLOSES $45 MILLION SERIES C FINANCING

Austin, TX — June 15, 2023 — Meridian Technologies, Inc., a leading provider of embedded payment
infrastructure for financial institutions, today announced the closing of a $45 million Series C
financing round. The round was led by Parkview Growth Equity, with participation from existing
investors Bridgewater Ventures and Cascade Capital.

Meridian will use the proceeds to accelerate product development, expand i

title: Atlas Capital — Fintech Infrastructure Sector Overview (Feb 2024)
short_summary: Atlas internal sector overview. Identifies Meridian as primary acquisition target. Describes ideal profile: $30-60M ARR, >20% growth, NRR >110%. Names two alternative targets.
excerpt:

title: Atlas Capital — Project Clearwater Initial DD Memo
short_summary: Phase 1 DD findings. Recommends advancing to Phase 2. Key risks: customer concentration, H2 2023 sales slowdown, unexplained CTO departure in January 2024.
excerpt:

title: Atlas Capital — Project Clearwater Financial Model v2.0
short_summary: Current model. Entry EV $340M (8.9x ARR), 22% growth, 24% IRR, 2.4x MOIC. Adds customer churn stress case. Supersedes v1.0.
excerpt:
ATLAS CAPITAL PARTNERS — FINANCIAL MODEL SUMMARY
PROJECT CLEARWATER: MERIDIAN TECHNOLOGIES
Version 2.0 | April 10, 2024 | CONFIDENTIAL — VP AND ABOVE

PREPARED BY: Marcus Webb, VP

REVISION NOTES

Version 2.0 supersedes Version 1.0 (March 25, 2024). Key changes:
  — FY2024 ARR growth assumption reduced from 35% to 22% following customer concentration
    analysis (see Diana Park memo, April 8, 2024)
  — Updated management projections received April 5, 2024
  — H1 2024 new logo assumption reduced

title: Atlas Capital — IC Memo: Acquisition of Meridian Technologies

title: Atlas Capital — Project Clearwater Customer Concentration Analysis
short_summary: Detailed ARR breakdown by customer. Top 3 = 58.5% of ARR ($22.3M). Notes concentration increased from Q3 2023 estimates. Flags August 2024 Customer 3 renewal as a pre-close risk.
excerpt:
